abstract: Initializes a component system to manage components of the specified class.
overview:
## Return Value

A new component system.

## Discussion

Each [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKComponentSystem] object manages components of a specific [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKComponent] subclass, which you specify with the `class` parameter in this intializer. After initializing a component system, you may add components to it only if their type matches the system’s component class.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

# init(componentClass:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a component system to manage components of the specified class.

## Declaration

```swift
init(componentClass cls: AnyClass)
```

## Return Value

A new component system.

## Discussion

Each [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKComponentSystem] object manages components of a specific [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKComponent] subclass, which you specify with the `class` parameter in this intializer. After initializing a component system, you may add components to it only if their type matches the system’s component class.

For more information, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].
